# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for GCE firewall rules. Create rules that allow SSH (port 22), RDP (port 3389), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source IP (0.0.0.0/0). Our development team needs global access to test instances.

Prevent cloud network security.
# Category: cloud_network_security

# firewall-rules.yaml
# WARNING: These rules allow global access (0.0.0.0/0) and should ONLY be used
# in isolated development environments. For production, restrict sourceRanges
# to specific IP addresses or CIDR blocks.
#
# Recommended alternatives:
#   - Use IAP (Identity-Aware Proxy) for SSH/RDP instead of opening ports globally
#   - Use a VPN or bastion host
#   - Restrict sourceRanges to your office/VPN IP ranges
#   - Use network tags to limit which instances these rules apply to

resources:

# SSH Access - Port 22
- name: allow-ssh-dev
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: projects/{{ env["project"] }}/global/networks/default
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceRanges:
      - "0.0.0.0/0"
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - "22"
    targetTags:
      - dev-ssh
    description: >
      DEV ONLY - Allows SSH from any source. Replace sourceRanges with
      specific IPs before promoting to staging/production.
    logConfig:
      enable: true

# RDP Access - Port 3389
- name: allow-rdp-dev
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: projects/{{ env["project"] }}/global/networks/default
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceRanges:
      - "0.0.0.0/0"
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - "3389"
    targetTags:
      - dev-rdp
    description: >
      DEV ONLY - Allows RDP from any source. Replace sourceRanges with
      specific IPs before promoting to staging/production.
    logConfig:
      enable: true

# HTTP Access - Port 80
- name: allow-http-dev
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: projects/{{ env["project"] }}/global/networks/default
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceRanges:
      - "0.0.0.0/0"
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - "80"
    targetTags:
      - dev-http
    description: >
      DEV ONLY - Allows HTTP from any source. Consider using HTTPS only
      and restricting sourceRanges for non-public services.
    logConfig:
      enable: true

# HTTPS Access - Port 443
- name: allow-https-dev
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: projects/{{ env["project"] }}/global/networks/default
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceRanges:
      - "0.0.0.0/0"
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - "443"
    targetTags:
      - dev-https
    description: >
      DEV ONLY - Allows HTTPS from any source. Restrict sourceRanges
      for non-public services.
    logConfig:
      enable: true

outputs:
  - name: ssh-rule
    value: $(ref.allow-ssh-dev.selfLink)
  - name: rdp-rule
    value: $(ref.allow-rdp-dev.selfLink)
  - name: http-rule
    value: $(ref.allow-http-dev.selfLink)
  - name: https-rule
    value: $(ref.allow-https-dev.selfLink)
